overall.description: Game engine footage showing the interior of a stationary public bus during a rainy night. The camera moves slowly forward through the empty passenger cabin toward the driver's cockpit, showcasing detailed vehicle interiors and rain-streaked windows with an industrial exterior visible outside.

agents.ego_description: moving slowly through the empty bus aisle toward the front cabin, passing yellow handrails and passenger seats

entered.detail: bright yellow vertical and horizontal safety poles along the left side of the aisle
white and grey upholstered bus seats lining the right side of the cabin
white high-back driver's seat visible at the far end of the aisle
large windows with heavy rain droplets streaking down the glass
white curved ceiling with overhead lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the narrow aisle of an empty bus during a rainy night. Yellow safety handrails line the left side while white passenger seats occupy the right. Through the rain-streaked windows, dark industrial structures are barely visible outside under the artificial interior lighting.

agents.ego_description: approaching the driver's cockpit and focusing on the vehicle controls and steering wheel

entered.detail: grey multi-spoke steering wheel with central controls
complex instrument panel with various buttons and digital displays
black control unit with yellow 'GAS' text labeling near the driver's seat
large front window with rain droplets and wipers visible, overlooking dark wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the front of the bus, focusing on the driver's cockpit. The steering wheel, dashboard controls, and a console labeled 'GAS' become prominent on the right. The driver seat now fills the right side of the frame while the passenger seats and handrails fall behind the field of view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through the interior of a stationary bus, transitioning from the empty passenger cabin to the detailed driver's cockpit. It begins by gliding down the narrow aisle, passing yellow safety handrails on the left and white passenger seats on the right under artificial lighting. As the camera advances, rain-streaked windows reveal glimpses of dark industrial structures in the night outside. The scene then shifts as the passenger area falls behind the field of view, opening up to the front of the vehicle. Finally, the camera focuses on the cockpit, where the steering wheel, dashboard controls, and a console labeled GAS become prominent beside the driver's seat.
